name: President Taft Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 9-inch pie pan with pastry.
2. Mix sugars, salt and spices in a bowl.
3. Add pumpkin to the sugar mixture.
4. Add egg yolks and milk, stirring until combined.
5. Add more spices if desired.
6. Fold in beaten egg whites until just mixed, not too stiff.
7. Pour the filling into the unbaked pie shell.
8. Bake at 450 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes.
9. Reduce the temperature to 350 degrees Fahrenheit and bake until done, about 30 to 40 minutes (depending on your oven).
10. The pie is ready when a knife inserted into the center comes out clean.
